findings.description: PascalCase class name `Result` (and its nested class `Result.Success`) appears in s4 content as a concrete example for nested class constructor specification, but is not listed in s4 hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source s4 content: `nablarch.fw.Result.Success` (class/interface level example), `nablarch.fw.Result.Success.Result.Success()` (nested constructor example) — both appear multiple times in the 設定ファイル記述方法 section.
